# Fresh Face Studio

> Boutique skincare studio in North Myrtle Beach, SC. Personalized facials, chemical peels, microneedling, and advanced skin treatments in a renovated 1950s beach bungalow. Owner and licensed esthetician Maria Conover.

## About
- [About Fresh Face Studio](https://yourfreshface.com/about): Our story, the bungalow, and what makes Fresh Face different. Boutique one-on-one skincare experience in North Myrtle Beach.

## Services
- [All Services & Pricing](https://yourfreshface.com/services): Complete service menu including Classic Facials ($90), Custom Facials ($140), Chemical Peels ($130), Microneedling ($250+), Nanoneedling LuminFusion ($150), Dermaplaning ($50), Lash Lifts, Brow Services, and Waxing.
- [Book an Appointment](https://yourfreshface.com/book): Online booking with service selection and pricing. Serving North Myrtle Beach, Myrtle Beach, Little River, Conway, Surfside Beach, and the Grand Strand.

## Shop
- [Shop](https://yourfreshface.com/shop): Hub for memberships, treatment packages, and gift cards from Fresh Face Studio. Three ways to commit to your skin or give the gift of glow.
- [Membership](https://yourfreshface.com/shop/memberships): The Fresh Face Membership — one Classic Facial plus one Full-face Dermaplaning every month for $125 (saves $15/month vs à la carte).
- [Treatment Packages](https://yourfreshface.com/shop/packages): Pre-paid series including the Microneedling Package ($750, save $250), Custom Facial + Dermaplane Combo ($1,880, save $400), and Get-Ready-For-Summer collagen series ($665, save $190).
- [Gift Cards](https://yourfreshface.com/shop/gift-cards): Send a Fresh Face gift card in $50, $75, $100, $200, or custom amounts. Multiple designs, schedulable delivery date, and personal message.

## Skin School (Blog)
- [Skin School](https://yourfreshface.com/blog): Expert skincare education from a licensed esthetician. Tips for coastal living, treatment guides, ingredient breakdowns, and myth-busting.
- [Chemical Peel vs. Microneedling](https://yourfreshface.com/blog/chemical-peel-vs-microneedling): Honest comparison of two popular advanced treatments — what each does, who they're best for, and how to choose.
- [Best Facial in North Myrtle Beach](https://yourfreshface.com/blog/best-facial-north-myrtle-beach): What to look for when choosing an esthetician, red flags, and green flags.
- [Skincare Routine for Beach Living](https://yourfreshface.com/blog/skincare-routine-beach-living-sc): How coastal SC climate affects your skin and how to adjust your routine.
- [What to Expect at Your First Facial](https://yourfreshface.com/blog/what-to-expect-first-facial): Step-by-step guide for first-timers — what happens, does it hurt, how to prepare.
- [Dermaplaning Myths vs Facts](https://yourfreshface.com/blog/dermaplaning-myths-facts): Licensed esthetician debunks common misconceptions about dermaplaning.

## Contact
- [Contact & Location](https://yourfreshface.com/contact): 1626 Hwy 17 S Suite F, North Myrtle Beach, SC 29582. Phone: (843) 457-2448. Mon-Sat 9AM-5PM. House calls available.
